description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted with a slender build and standing posture. The individual is dressed in a sleeveless top with a scoop neckline and a row of buttons, paired with fitted pants and closed-toe shoes. The figure's arms are raised and extended backward in an unnatural, exaggerated manner, creating a dramatic V-shape above the head. The head is oval-shaped with medium-length hair styled in a low ponytail. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes appear practical for walking. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian, though the arm position is highly atypical for a real-world scenario.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian with a sleeveless top, fitted pants, and closed shoes, standing upright with arms raised dramatically backward. The figure has medium-length hair in a ponytail and a slender build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top with buttons, and both arms raised in a V-shape behind the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the curve of the back, and the extreme backward extension of the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, ponytail, and both arms crossing in a V-shape behind the body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the fitted clothing, and the backward extension of the right arm.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless buttoned top and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised and extended backward
